Metadata.SourceFile: Fearless Fred and the Factory of Doom.tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x9034 "FEARLESSFREDANDTHEFACTORYOFDOOM-9034" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Fearless Fred and the Factory of Doom.prg"
